title: States collection
description: All first-level administrative divisions (states + union territories) of a country, keyed by ECI state code. ECI codes are the canonical identifiers; ISO 3166-2 codes are carried for cross-referencing.

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Country, list of states with ECI code, ISO 3166-2 code, name, type, capital, notes.
Replaced optional source_url with required source field per provenance contract (CLAUDE.md §12).
Replaced single source string with sources array of {url, fetched_at} per ADR-0002. Empty array means hand-authored. Item-level source overrides removed.

Additive: optional verification_status enum on each state entry. Records whether the (eci_code, name) pair was confirmed by a live URL probe, by a cited published authority only, or remains unverified. Downstream fetchers must gate per-state work on live_url_probe_ok per Gregor architecture review 2026-05-11.

Additive: optional name (human-readable upstream name) and authority (issuing body) fields on each sources[] entry. Aligns with Phase A schemas (feature_collection.metadata, indicator) so attribution can be uniform across electoral and socio-economic data. Per TODO/SOCIO-ECONOMIC-EXPANSION.md §6 D3.

Additive: optional `tier` enum on each state entry. Distinguishes general-category states from special-category (NEH/hill), UTs with/without legislatures, and NCT Delhi. Used by cross-state comparison views to default-filter ranked tables to general-category states (since special-category states have different CSS funding ratios and Article 371 carve-outs that make them not comparable in the same ranked view). Per Governance Strategist review 2026-05-11.

Additive: optional `name_ta` (Tamil-script localised name, e.g. "தமிழ்நாடு") on each state entry. Tooltip / search affordance only — never an identifier. Lands in the same arc as its consumer (IndicatorChoropleth tooltip in TN drill-down — Phase 4 of TODO/TN-GRANULAR-GEO-PLAN.md, Fowler YAGNI). Existing v3.3 data files re-validate unchanged.

sources.description: Provenance per CLAUDE.md §12 / ADR-0002. Each entry is one upstream URL plus the timestamp our pipeline fetched it. An empty array signals hand-authored content.

name.description: Optional human-readable name of the upstream (e.g. "Statistical Report on General Election to Legislative Assembly of Tamil Nadu, 2021").

authority.description: Optional issuing authority (e.g. "Election Commission of India").

eci_code.description: Election Commission of India state code (e.g. S22 for Tamil Nadu, U07 for Delhi).

name_ta.description: Optional Tamil-script localised name (e.g. "தமிழ்நாடு"). Tooltip / search affordance only — never an identifier. v3.4.

verification_status.description: How the (eci_code, name) pairing was confirmed for this row. 'live_url_probe_ok' means a results.eci.gov.in URL bearing this code resolved with HTTP 200 and a matching state name. 'published_authority_only' means the code appears in a cited ECI Statistical Report or equivalent published authority but no live endpoint has been probed yet. 'unverified' means the pairing is provisional. Per Gregor architecture review 2026-05-11: per-state fetchers MUST refuse to compose URLs for rows whose status is not live_url_probe_ok.

tier.description: Fiscal/administrative tier. The Centre formally retired the 'special category' designation after the 14th Finance Commission, but the operational distinction survives in CSS funding ratios (90:10 vs 60:40), Article 371 carve-outs, NEC/DoNER allocations, and (for UTs) whether a Council of Ministers exists. Default cross-state ranked tables filter to `general_category`. Per Governance Strategist review 2026-05-11.
